name: punchwall-map-progression
description: Validate spawn placement, progression gates, and key interaction affordances.

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local player = game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()[1]
assert(player, "missing player")
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local root = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart", 5)
assert(root, "missing character root")
local distance = (root.Position - Vector3.new(-42, 2, 0)).Magnitude
return HttpService:JSONEncode({ hasCharacter = true, spawnNearTraining = distance < 40, spawnDistance = math.floor(distance + 0.5), mapExists = workspace:FindFirstChild("PunchWallRPG") ~= nil })

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation", 5)
assert(command, "missing PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("Reset")
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("HitWall", "Concrete Wall"))

steps.label: fresh player blocked by concrete gate
high-tier wall has gate metadata and affordance

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local stand=root.Interactables["Boxing Glove Stand"] local plate=root.Polish["City Decor"]["Boxing Glove Armory Nameplate"] return H:JSONEncode({click=stand:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector")~=nil,front=plate:FindFirstChild("Sign")~=nil,plateRole=plate:GetAttribute("PolishRole")})

steps.label: shop stand has click target and fixed nameplate
